Contact

Send a signal.

Pitch a story, ask about the space between the lines, or share whatever caught your eye. The .alomat desk reads every line that comes in.

Signal signal@alomat.uz

Direct channel for story tips, signals, leads, and reader feedback.

Editor editor@alomat.uz

Editorial corrections, press requests, and content feedback.

Sponsorship sponsorship@alomat.uz

Sponsorship and partnership inquiries.

Daily chatter

We usually get back within 24 hours.
